title.zh: 潮汕牛肉火锅 | Chaoshan Beef Hotpot
title.en: Chaoshan Beef Hotpot | 潮汕牛肉火锅

description.zh: 鲜嫩多汁的牛肉，浓郁的牛骨汤，深圳必尝美食
description.en: Tender beef, rich bone broth, a must-try in Shenzhen

zh: 潮汕牛肉火锅以“鲜”为灵魂，坚持现宰现卖现煮的极致新鲜理念。每天凌晨从潮汕本地屠宰场直运的黄牛，到店后仅需数小时即可端上餐桌，最大程度保留了牛肉的原始鲜美。
潮汕牛肉火锅的精髓在于对牛肉部位的极致细分，从吊龙伴、匙仁到三花趾、五花趾，每个部位都有独特的口感和涮煮时间要求。吊龙伴肉质鲜嫩多汁，匙仁口感爽滑，三花趾脆嫩有嚼劲，五花趾则是脆弹爽口。
搭配浓郁醇香的牛骨汤底，由数十种中药材慢熬数小时而成，既保留了牛肉的原汁原味，又增添了滋补养生的功效。汤底中还可以加入玉米、萝卜等配菜，增加口感的层次感。
涮好的牛肉只需蘸上简单的沙茶酱或普宁豆酱，就能品尝到最纯粹的潮汕风味。沙茶酱浓郁醇厚，普宁豆酱咸香可口，与牛肉的鲜美相得益彰。
潮汕牛肉火锅不仅是美食的享受，更是潮汕文化的重要组成部分。每一口牛肉都承载着潮汕人的饮食智慧和对生活的热爱。
en: Chaoshan Beef Hotpot takes freshness as its soul, adhering to the ultimate freshness concept of slaughtering, selling and cooking on the spot. Yellow cattle directly transported from local slaughterhouses in Chaoshan every early morning can be served on the table within a few hours after arriving at the store, maximizing the retention of the original freshness of the beef.

The essence of Chaoshan Beef Hotpot lies in the extreme subdivision of beef cuts, from 'diaolongban' to 'shiren', 'sanhuazhi' to 'wuhuazhi', each cut has unique texture and boiling time requirements. 'Diaolongban' is tender and juicy, 'shiren' is smooth and slippery, 'sanhuazhi' is crispy and chewy, and 'wuhuazhi' is crispy and elastic.

Paired with rich and mellow beef bone soup base, which is slow-cooked for several hours with dozens of Chinese medicinal herbs, it not only retains the original flavor of the beef but also adds nourishing health benefits. You can also add ingredients such as corn and radish to the soup base to increase the layering of taste.

The boiled beef only needs to be dipped in simple satay sauce or Puning soybean paste to taste the purest Chaoshan flavor. Satay sauce is rich and mellow, Puning soybean paste is salty and fragrant, complementing the freshness of the beef.
Chaoshan Beef Hotpot is not only a food enjoyment but also an important part of Chaoshan culture. Every bite of beef carries the culinary wisdom and love for life of Chaoshan people.

description.zh: 清甜椰子水煮文昌鸡，深圳特色美食
description.en: Wenchang chicken cooked in sweet coconut water, a Shenzhen specialty

zh: 椰子鸡是深圳极具代表性的特色美食，将海南文昌鸡与新鲜椰子水完美融合，创造出清爽鲜甜的独特风味。
选用生长在海南文昌的优质走地鸡，鸡肉皮薄肉嫩，脂肪分布均匀，经过严格的筛选和处理，确保每一口都鲜嫩多汁。文昌鸡以其肉质鲜嫩、皮薄骨软而闻名，是椰子鸡的最佳选择。
汤底由3-4个新鲜海南椰子水直接倒入锅中，不添加任何清水或调味料，完全保留了椰子的天然清甜。煮出来的鸡肉带有淡淡的椰香，口感滑嫩不柴。椰子水的清甜与鸡肉的鲜美相得益彰，让人回味无穷。
除了鸡肉，还可以加入竹荪、马蹄、珍珠马蹄等配菜，吸收了椰汁的清甜，更加鲜美可口。竹荪脆嫩爽口，马蹄清甜多汁，珍珠马蹄则是软糯香甜，为椰子鸡增添了更多的口感层次。
椰子鸡的蘸料也是一大特色，由沙姜、小米辣、青柠、生抽等调制而成，酸辣开胃，与清甜的鸡肉形成完美搭配。沙姜的独特香气、小米辣的辣味、青柠的酸味和生抽的咸味，相互融合，为椰子鸡增添了更多的风味。
椰子鸡不仅是美食的享受，更是健康的选择。椰子水富含维生素和矿物质，具有清热解暑、生津止渴的功效；鸡肉则是优质蛋白质的来源，有助于增强体质。
en: Coconut chicken is a highly representative specialty food in Shenzhen, perfectly combining Hainan Wenchang chicken with fresh coconut water to create a unique flavor of refreshing sweetness.

Using high-quality free-range chickens grown in Wenchang, Hainan, the chicken has thin skin and tender meat with even fat distribution. After strict selection and processing, every bite is juicy and tender. Wenchang chicken is famous for its tender meat, thin skin and soft bones, making it the best choice for coconut chicken.

The soup base is made by directly pouring 3-4 fresh Hainan coconut waters into the pot without adding any water or seasonings, completely retaining the natural sweetness of the coconut. The cooked chicken has a light coconut fragrance and a tender, non-tough texture. The sweetness of coconut water complements the freshness of chicken, leaving a lasting impression.

In addition to chicken, you can also add ingredients such as bamboo fungus, water chestnuts, and pearl water chestnuts, which absorb the sweetness of the coconut juice and become even more delicious. Bamboo fungus is crispy and refreshing, water chestnuts are sweet and juicy, and pearl water chestnuts are soft and sweet, adding more texture layers to coconut chicken.

The dipping sauce for coconut chicken is also a highlight, made from sand ginger, millet pepper, lime, light soy sauce, etc., which is sour and spicy, perfectly matching the sweet chicken. The unique aroma of sand ginger, the spiciness of millet pepper, the sourness of lime and the saltiness of light soy sauce blend together, adding more flavor to coconut chicken.

Coconut chicken is not only a food enjoyment but also a healthy choice. Coconut water is rich in vitamins and minerals, which has the effect of clearing heat and relieving summer heat, promoting body fluid and quenching thirst; chicken is a source of high-quality protein, which helps to enhance physical fitness.

title.zh: 广式早茶 | Cantonese Dim Sum
title.en: Cantonese Dim Sum | 广式早茶

description.zh: 一盅两件，享受悠闲的早晨时光
description.en: Enjoy a leisurely morning with tea and dim sum

zh: 广式早茶是广东饮食文化的重要组成部分，也是深圳人生活中不可或缺的休闲方式。“一盅两件”的早茶文化，体现了广东人悠闲自在的生活态度。
早茶点心种类繁多，从经典的虾饺、烧卖、凤爪、排骨，到蛋挞、叉烧包、糯米鸡，再到肠粉、粥品、蒸饭，应有尽有，满足不同口味需求。每一款点心都有其独特的制作工艺和口感特点。
虾饺是早茶的经典代表，皮薄如蝉翼，内馅饱满多汁，虾仁鲜嫩爽口，搭配笋丁和猪肉，口感丰富。烧卖则以猪肉馅为主，顶部点缀着蟹籽或鱼子，鲜美无比。凤爪经过长时间炖煮，软糯入味，入口即化，搭配特制的酱汁，味道更加浓郁。
除了经典点心，早茶还有很多特色小吃，比如蛋挞、叉烧包、糯米鸡等。蛋挞外皮酥脆，内馅嫩滑香甜；叉烧包外皮松软，内馅叉烧肉鲜嫩多汁；糯米鸡则是将糯米和鸡肉、香菇等食材包裹在荷叶中蒸制而成，香气扑鼻。
早茶不仅是美食的享受，更是社交的场合。亲朋好友围坐一桌，一边品尝点心，一边聊天叙旧，享受悠闲的早晨时光。深圳的早茶餐厅遍布全市，从老字号茶楼到连锁茶餐厅，都能品尝到正宗的广式早茶。
早茶的茶水也是一大特色，从普洱茶、铁观音到菊花茶、罗汉果茶，应有尽有。茶水不仅可以解渴，还能帮助消化，搭配点心食用，更加美味。
en: Cantonese morning tea is an important part of Guangdong's food culture and an indispensable leisure activity in Shenzhen people's lives. The morning tea culture of 'one cup of tea and two dim sum' reflects the leisurely and carefree attitude of Guangdong people.

There is a huge variety of morning tea dim sum, from classic shrimp dumplings, siu mai, chicken feet, spare ribs, to egg tarts, barbecued pork buns, glutinous rice chicken, and also cheung fun, congee, steamed rice, everything you can imagine to meet different taste needs. Each dim sum has its unique production process and taste characteristics.

Shrimp dumplings are a classic representative of morning tea, with thin skin like cicada wings and juicy fillings. The shrimp is fresh and refreshing, paired with bamboo shoots and pork, with rich taste. Siu mai is mainly made of pork filling, topped with crab roe or fish roe, extremely delicious. Chicken feet are stewed for a long time, soft and flavorful, melting in the mouth, paired with special sauce, the taste is more rich.

In addition to classic dim sum, morning tea also has many special snacks, such as egg tarts, barbecued pork buns, glutinous rice chicken, etc. Egg tarts have crispy outer skin and smooth, sweet inner filling; barbecued pork buns have soft outer skin and juicy barbecued pork filling; glutinous rice chicken is made by wrapping glutinous rice, chicken, mushrooms and other ingredients in lotus leaves and steaming them, with a fragrant aroma.

Morning tea is not only a food enjoyment but also a social occasion. Relatives and friends sit around a table, tasting dim sum while chatting and catching up, enjoying the leisurely morning time. Cantonese morning tea restaurants are all over Shenzhen, from time-honored tea houses to chain tea restaurants, you can taste authentic Cantonese morning tea.

The tea for morning tea is also a highlight, from Pu'er tea, Tieguanyin to chrysanthemum tea, luohanguo tea, everything you can imagine. Tea not only quenches thirst but also helps digestion, making it more delicious when paired with dim sum.

description.zh: 靠海吃海，新鲜生猛的海鲜盛宴
description.en: Fresh and lively seafood feast by the sea

zh: 深圳地处南海之滨，拥有丰富的海洋资源，海鲜大餐是深圳美食的一大特色。盐田海鲜街、南澳海鲜市场等海鲜聚集地，每天吸引着大量食客前来品尝新鲜生猛的海鲜。
深圳的海鲜以“新鲜生猛”著称，海鲜市场里的鱼虾蟹贝都是当天从海里捕捞上来的，活蹦乱跳，让人垂涎欲滴。渔民们每天凌晨出海捕鱼，清晨归来时，渔船上满载着各种新鲜海鲜，包括石斑鱼、龙虾、螃蟹、皮皮虾等。
海鲜的做法多种多样，从清蒸、红烧到椒盐、避风塘炒，每一种做法都能展现海鲜的独特风味。清蒸石斑鱼保留了鱼肉的鲜嫩多汁，原汁原味；椒盐皮皮虾外酥里嫩，香气扑鼻；避风塘炒蟹色泽金黄，口感香脆，搭配特制的避风塘调料，味道更加浓郁。
除了海鲜市场，深圳还有很多海鲜酒楼和大排档，提供各种海鲜套餐和特色菜品。无论是家庭聚餐还是朋友聚会，海鲜大餐都是不错的选择。海鲜酒楼通常会提供海鲜拼盘、海鲜火锅等特色菜品，让食客可以一次性品尝到多种海鲜的美味。
在深圳品尝海鲜，不仅能享受美食的乐趣，还能欣赏到美丽的海景，感受海边的悠闲氛围。盐田海鲜街位于盐田港旁边，食客们可以一边品尝海鲜，一边欣赏港口的繁忙景象；南澳海鲜市场则位于南澳半岛，周围环绕着美丽的海滩和海景，让人流连忘返。
深圳的海鲜不仅新鲜美味，而且价格实惠。海鲜市场里的海鲜价格通常比海鲜酒楼便宜很多，食客们可以自己挑选海鲜，然后让市场里的餐厅帮忙加工，既新鲜又划算。
en: Shenzhen is located on the coast of the South China Sea and has rich marine resources. Seafood feast is a major feature of Shenzhen cuisine. Seafood gathering places such as Yantian Seafood Street and Nan'ao Seafood Market attract a large number of diners every day to taste fresh and lively seafood.

Shenzhen's seafood is famous for its 'fresh and lively' quality. The fish, shrimp, crabs and shells in the seafood market are all caught from the sea on the same day, lively and mouth-watering. Fishermen go out to sea every early morning to fish, and when they return in the early morning, the fishing boats are full of various fresh seafood, including grouper, lobster, crab, mantis shrimp, etc.

There are various cooking methods for seafood, from steaming and braising to salt and pepper and typhoon shelter style. Each method can show the unique flavor of seafood. Steamed grouper retains the tender and juicy texture of the fish, original taste; salt and pepper mantis shrimp is crispy on the outside and tender on the inside with a fragrant aroma; typhoon shelter style crab has a golden color and crispy taste, paired with special typhoon shelter seasoning, the taste is more rich.

In addition to seafood markets, there are many seafood restaurants and food stalls in Shenzhen, providing various seafood set meals and special dishes. Whether it's a family dinner or a gathering of friends, seafood feast is a good choice. Seafood restaurants usually provide special dishes such as seafood platter and seafood hot pot, allowing diners to taste the deliciousness of multiple seafood at one time.

Tasting seafood in Shenzhen not only allows you to enjoy the fun of delicious food, but also enjoy the beautiful sea view and feel the leisurely atmosphere by the sea. Yantian Seafood Street is located next to Yantian Port, diners can taste seafood while enjoying the busy scene of the port; Nan'ao Seafood Market is located in Nan'ao Peninsula, surrounded by beautiful beaches and sea views, making people reluctant to leave.

Shenzhen's seafood is not only fresh and delicious but also affordable. The price of seafood in the seafood market is usually much cheaper than that in seafood restaurants. Diners can choose seafood by themselves and then ask the restaurants in the market to process it, which is both fresh and cost-effective.

description.zh: 东门老街、华强北，汇聚各地特色小吃
description.en: Dongmen Old Street, Huaqiangbei, gathering snacks from all over

zh: 深圳的街头小吃是城市烟火气息的代表，汇聚了全国各地的特色美食，从东门老街到华强北，从城中村到商业中心，到处都能看到街头小吃的身影。
烤生蚝是深圳街头小吃的经典代表，新鲜的生蚝放在炭火上烤制，撒上蒜蓉、辣椒和葱花，香气扑鼻，口感鲜嫩多汁。生蚝的鲜美与蒜蓉的香味相互融合，让人回味无穷。
除了烤生蚝，深圳的街头小吃还有酸辣粉、臭豆腐、鸡蛋仔、章鱼小丸子、手抓饼等。酸辣粉麻辣鲜香，口感爽滑，搭配特制的辣椒油和花生碎，味道更加浓郁；臭豆腐外酥里嫩，臭味独特，搭配特制的酱料，让人欲罢不能；鸡蛋仔外脆内软，香甜可口，是深圳人喜爱的下午茶点心。
深圳的街头小吃不仅种类繁多，而且价格亲民，是深圳打工人和学生党喜爱的美食选择。街头小吃摊通常位于人流量较大的地方，比如东门老街、华强北、城中村等，方便食客随时随地品尝美食。
在深圳的街头巷尾，一边品尝着美味的小吃，一边感受着城市的热闹氛围，是一种独特的生活体验。街头小吃摊的摊主们通常都很热情，会主动与食客交流，让人感受到家的温暖。
深圳的街头小吃不仅是美食的享受，更是城市文化的重要组成部分。每一种街头小吃都承载着深圳人的记忆和情感，是深圳人生活中不可或缺的一部分。
en: Shenzhen's street food is a representative of the city's lively atmosphere, gathering specialty foods from all over the country. From Dongmen Old Street to Huaqiangbei, from urban villages to commercial centers, street food can be seen everywhere.

Grilled oysters are a classic representative of Shenzhen's street food. Fresh oysters are grilled on charcoal fire, sprinkled with garlic, chili and scallions, with a fragrant aroma and tender, juicy texture. The freshness of oysters blends with the aroma of garlic, leaving a lasting impression.

In addition to grilled oysters, Shenzhen's street food also includes hot and sour noodles, stinky tofu, egg waffles, takoyaki, hand-pulled noodles, etc. Hot and sour noodles are spicy and fragrant with a smooth texture, paired with special chili oil and peanut crumbs, the taste is more rich; stinky tofu is crispy on the outside and tender on the inside with a unique smell, paired with special sauce, making people unable to stop eating; egg waffles are crispy on the outside and soft on the inside, sweet and delicious, a favorite afternoon tea snack for Shenzhen people.

Shenzhen's street food not only has a huge variety but also is affordable, making it a favorite food choice for Shenzhen workers and students. Street food stalls are usually located in places with large pedestrian flow, such as Dongmen Old Street, Huaqiangbei, urban villages, etc., making it convenient for diners to taste food anytime, anywhere.

In the streets and alleys of Shenzhen, tasting delicious snacks while feeling the lively atmosphere of the city is a unique life experience. The stall owners of street food are usually very enthusiastic, taking the initiative to communicate with diners, making people feel the warmth of home.

Shenzhen's street food is not only a food enjoyment but also an important part of urban culture. Each street food carries the memories and emotions of Shenzhen people, and is an indispensable part of Shenzhen people's lives.

title.zh: 隆江猪脚饭 | Pork Leg Rice
title.en: Pork Leg Rice | 隆江猪脚饭

description.zh: 深圳打工人的灵魂美食，肥而不腻
description.en: Soul food for Shenzhen workers, fatty but not greasy

zh: 隆江猪脚饭是深圳打工人的灵魂美食，以其软糯入味的猪脚和浓郁的卤汁深受广大食客喜爱。
隆江猪脚饭的猪脚选用优质的猪前蹄，经过多道工序处理，先焯水去血沫，再用特制的卤料慢炖数小时，直到猪脚皮糯肉烂，入口即化。猪皮富含胶原蛋白，口感软糯，猪肉则是鲜嫩多汁，肥而不腻。
卤汁是隆江猪脚饭的精髓，由数十种中药材和香料慢熬而成，色泽红亮，香气浓郁，味道醇厚。卤汁中包含八角、桂皮、香叶、草果等多种香料，经过长时间的慢熬，香料的香味充分融入卤汁中，使得猪脚更加入味。
隆江猪脚饭通常搭配酸菜和米饭，酸菜的酸爽解腻，与猪脚的油腻形成完美搭配。米饭吸收了卤汁的香味，更加香甜可口。有些隆江猪脚饭店还会搭配卤蛋、豆腐等配菜，增加口感的层次感。
深圳的隆江猪脚饭店遍布全市，从街头小巷到商业中心，都能看到隆江猪脚饭的身影。价格亲民，分量十足，是深圳打工人的快餐首选。隆江猪脚饭不仅味道鲜美，而且营养丰富，是深圳打工人补充能量的最佳选择。
隆江猪脚饭的历史可以追溯到清朝末年，经过多年的发展，已经成为深圳饮食文化的重要组成部分。每一家隆江猪脚饭店都有其独特的卤汁配方和制作工艺，使得隆江猪脚饭的味道更加浓郁和独特。
en: Longjiang pork leg rice is the soul food of Shenzhen workers, deeply loved by diners for its soft and flavorful pork leg and rich gravy.

The pork leg used in Longjiang pork leg rice is high-quality pig front hoof, processed through multiple steps. First, it is blanched to remove blood foam, then slow-cooked with special marinade for several hours until the skin is soft and the meat is tender, melting in the mouth. The pig skin is rich in collagen, with a soft texture, and the pork is tender and juicy, fatty but not greasy.

The marinade is the essence of Longjiang pork leg rice, slow-cooked with dozens of Chinese medicinal herbs and spices, with a bright red color, rich aroma and mellow taste. The marinade contains various spices such as star anise, cinnamon, bay leaf, amomum tsao-ko, etc. After long-time slow cooking, the aroma of spices fully integrates into the marinade, making the pork leg more flavorful.

Longjiang pork leg rice is usually served with pickled vegetables and rice. The sour and refreshing pickled vegetables cut through the greasiness of the pork leg, forming a perfect match. The rice absorbs the flavor of the marinade, making it more sweet and delicious. Some Longjiang pork leg rice restaurants also serve with marinated eggs, tofu and other side dishes, increasing the layering of taste.

Longjiang pork leg rice restaurants are all over Shenzhen, from streets and alleys to commercial centers. With affordable prices and large portions, it is the first choice for Shenzhen workers as a fast food. Longjiang pork leg rice is not only delicious but also nutritious, making it the best choice for Shenzhen workers to replenish energy.

The history of Longjiang pork leg rice can be traced back to the late Qing Dynasty. After years of development, it has become an important part of Shenzhen's food culture. Each Longjiang pork leg rice restaurant has its unique marinade formula and production process, making the taste of Longjiang pork leg rice more rich and unique.

description.zh: 皮脆肉嫩，骨香多汁，深圳经典名菜
description.en: Crispy skin, tender meat, juicy and fragrant, a classic Shenzhen dish

zh: 光明乳鸽是深圳的一张美食名片，以其皮脆肉嫩、骨香多汁的独特口感深受广大食客喜爱。
光明乳鸽选用出生28天左右的乳鸽，此时的乳鸽肉质最为鲜嫩，脂肪分布均匀。经过严格的筛选和处理，确保每一只乳鸽都符合品质要求。乳鸽的生长环境也十分重要，光明区的乳鸽通常采用散养方式，以谷物和青草为食，使得乳鸽的肉质更加鲜嫩。
光明乳鸽的制作工艺十分讲究，先将乳鸽用特制的酱料腌制数小时，然后用高温油炸至皮脆肉嫩。炸好的乳鸽色泽金黄，外皮酥脆，内里肉质鲜嫩多汁，骨香浓郁。腌制酱料中包含八角、桂皮、香叶等多种香料，经过长时间的腌制，香料的香味充分融入乳鸽中，使得乳鸽更加入味。
光明乳鸽的吃法也有讲究，通常用手直接撕着吃，这样可以更好地感受乳鸽的皮脆肉嫩。搭配特制的椒盐或酸梅酱，口感更加丰富。椒盐的咸味与乳鸽的香味相互融合，酸梅酱的酸味则可以解腻，使得乳鸽的味道更加浓郁。
光明乳鸽不仅是美食的享受，更是深圳饮食文化的重要组成部分。每一只乳鸽都承载着光明区的历史和文化，是深圳人引以为傲的特色美食。光明乳鸽的历史可以追溯到上世纪80年代，经过多年的发展，已经成为深圳饮食文化的重要代表。
光明乳鸽的营养价值也很高，富含蛋白质、维生素和矿物质，具有滋补养生的功效。经常食用光明乳鸽可以增强体质，提高免疫力。
en: Guangming squab is a culinary card of Shenzhen, deeply loved by diners for its unique taste of crispy skin, tender meat, juicy and fragrant bones.

Guangming squab uses squabs that are about 28 days old, when the meat is the most tender with even fat distribution. After strict selection and processing, each squab meets the quality requirements. The growth environment of squabs is also very important. Squabs in Guangming District are usually free-range, feeding on grains and grass, making the meat of squabs more tender.

The production process of Guangming squab is very particular. First, the squab is marinated with special sauce for several hours, then deep-fried at high temperature until the skin is crispy and the meat is tender. The fried squab has a golden color, crispy skin, tender and juicy meat inside, and fragrant bones. The marinating sauce contains various spices such as star anise, cinnamon, bay leaf, etc. After long-time marinating, the aroma of spices fully integrates into the squab, making the squab more flavorful.

There is also a particular way to eat Guangming squab. It is usually eaten by tearing it directly with hands, which allows you to better feel the crispy skin and tender meat of the squab. Paired with special salt and pepper or plum sauce, the taste is more rich. The saltiness of salt and pepper blends with the aroma of squab, and the sourness of plum sauce can cut through the greasiness, making the taste of squab more rich.

Guangming squab is not only a food enjoyment but also an important part of Shenzhen's food culture. Each squab carries the history and culture of Guangming District, and is a specialty food that Shenzhen people are proud of. The history of Guangming squab can be traced back to the 1980s. After years of development, it has become an important representative of Shenzhen's food culture.

Guangming squab is also very nutritious, rich in protein, vitamins and minerals, with the effect of nourishing health. Regular consumption of Guangming squab can enhance physical fitness and improve immunity.

title.zh: 公明烧鹅 | Gongming Roast Goose
title.en: Gongming Roast Goose | 公明烧鹅

description.zh: 皮脆肉滑，香味浓郁，深圳传统名菜
description.en: Crispy skin, tender meat, rich aroma, traditional Shenzhen dish

zh: 公明烧鹅是深圳光明区的传统名菜，以其皮脆肉滑、香味浓郁的独特口感深受广大食客喜爱。
公明烧鹅选用本地散养的草鹅，这些草鹅以青草和谷物为食，肉质鲜嫩，脂肪分布均匀。经过严格的筛选和处理，确保每一只烧鹅都符合品质要求。草鹅的生长周期通常在6-8个月左右，此时的草鹅肉质最为鲜嫩，脂肪分布均匀。
公明烧鹅的制作工艺十分讲究，先将草鹅用特制的酱料腌制数小时，然后用木炭烤制。烤制过程中，师傅需要不断翻转烧鹅，确保受热均匀，皮脆肉嫩。腌制酱料中包含八角、桂皮、香叶等多种香料，经过长时间的腌制，香料的香味充分融入草鹅中，使得烧鹅更加入味。
公明烧鹅的皮脆肉嫩，肥而不腻，香味浓郁。咬一口，外皮酥脆，内里肉质鲜嫩多汁，香味扑鼻。搭配特制的酸梅酱，口感更加丰富。酸梅酱的酸味可以解腻，使得烧鹅的味道更加浓郁。
公明烧鹅不仅是美食的享受，更是深圳饮食文化的重要组成部分。每一只烧鹅都承载着公明区的历史和文化，是深圳人引以为傲的传统名菜。公明烧鹅的历史可以追溯到清朝末年，经过多年的发展，已经成为深圳饮食文化的重要代表。
公明烧鹅的营养价值也很高，富含蛋白质、维生素和矿物质，具有滋补养生的功效。经常食用公明烧鹅可以增强体质，提高免疫力。
en: Gongming roast goose is a traditional famous dish in Guangming District, Shenzhen, deeply loved by diners for its unique taste of crispy skin, tender meat and rich aroma.

Gongming roast goose uses local free-range grass geese, which feed on grass and grains, with tender meat and even fat distribution. After strict selection and processing, each roast goose meets the quality requirements. The growth cycle of grass geese is usually about 6-8 months, when the meat of grass geese is the most tender with even fat distribution.

The production process of Gongming roast goose is very particular. First, the grass goose is marinated with special sauce for several hours, then roasted with charcoal. During the roasting process, the chef needs to continuously turn the roast goose to ensure even heating, crispy skin and tender meat. The marinating sauce contains various spices such as star anise, cinnamon, bay leaf, etc. After long-time marinating, the aroma of spices fully integrates into the grass goose, making the roast goose more flavorful.

Gongming roast goose has crispy skin, tender meat, fatty but not greasy, and rich aroma. Take a bite, the outer skin is crispy, the inner meat is tender and juicy, with a fragrant aroma. Paired with special plum sauce, the taste is more rich. The sourness of plum sauce can cut through the greasiness, making the taste of roast goose more rich.

Gongming roast goose is not only a food enjoyment but also an important part of Shenzhen's food culture. Each roast goose carries the history and culture of Gongming District, and is a traditional famous dish that Shenzhen people are proud of. The history of Gongming roast goose can be traced back to the late Qing Dynasty. After years of development, it has become an important representative of Shenzhen's food culture.

Gongming roast goose is also very nutritious, rich in protein, vitamins and minerals, with the effect of nourishing health. Regular consumption of Gongming roast goose can enhance physical fitness and improve immunity.

title.zh: 深圳肠粉 | Shenzhen Cheung Fun
title.en: Shenzhen Cheung Fun | 深圳肠粉

description.zh: 薄如蝉翼，晶莹剔透，深圳早餐必备
description.en: Thin as cicada wings, crystal clear, essential Shenzhen breakfast

zh: 深圳肠粉是深圳早餐的必备美食，以其薄如蝉翼、晶莹剔透的独特口感深受广大食客喜爱。
深圳肠粉的制作工艺十分讲究，选用优质的大米浸泡数小时，然后磨成细腻的米浆。米浆中加入适量的淀粉和水，搅拌均匀后倒入特制的蒸盘中，蒸制而成。蒸制过程中，师傅需要掌握好火候和时间，确保肠粉的口感恰到好处。
深圳肠粉的馅料种类繁多，从经典的虾仁、牛肉、鸡蛋到叉烧、瘦肉、青菜，应有尽有。每一款肠粉都经过师傅的精心制作，馅料饱满，口感丰富。虾仁肠粉的虾仁鲜嫩爽口，牛肉肠粉的牛肉鲜嫩多汁，鸡蛋肠粉的鸡蛋滑嫩香甜。
深圳肠粉的酱汁是其精髓，由生抽、老抽、蚝油、糖等多种调料调制而成，色泽红亮，香气浓郁，味道醇厚。淋在肠粉上，再撒上葱花和芝麻，口感更加丰富。酱汁的味道可以根据个人口味进行调整，有些人喜欢偏咸的味道，有些人则喜欢偏甜的味道。
深圳的肠粉店遍布全市，从街头小巷到商业中心，都能看到肠粉店的身影。价格亲民，分量十足，是深圳人早餐的首选。肠粉店通常会提供多种口味的肠粉和配菜，让食客可以根据自己的口味进行选择。
深圳肠粉的历史可以追溯到上世纪80年代，经过多年的发展，已经成为深圳饮食文化的重要组成部分。每一家肠粉店都有其独特的制作工艺和酱汁配方，使得深圳肠粉的味道更加浓郁和独特。
en: Shenzhen cheung fun is an essential breakfast food in Shenzhen, deeply loved by diners for its unique taste of thin as cicada wings and crystal clear.

The production process of Shenzhen cheung fun is very particular. High-quality rice is soaked for several hours, then ground into fine rice slurry. Appropriate amount of starch and water are added to the rice slurry, stirred evenly and poured into a special steaming plate for steaming. During the steaming process, the chef needs to master the heat and time to ensure the cheung fun has the perfect taste.

There are various fillings for Shenzhen cheung fun, from classic shrimp, beef, eggs to barbecued pork, lean meat, vegetables, everything you can imagine. Each cheung fun is carefully made by chefs with full fillings and rich taste. Shrimp cheung fun has fresh and refreshing shrimp, beef cheung fun has tender and juicy beef, and egg cheung fun has smooth and sweet eggs.

The sauce is the essence of Shenzhen cheung fun, made from various seasonings such as light soy sauce, dark soy sauce, oyster sauce, sugar, etc., with a bright red color, rich aroma and mellow taste. Drizzled on the cheung fun, then sprinkled with scallions and sesame seeds, the taste is more rich. The taste of sauce can be adjusted according to personal taste. Some people prefer salty taste, while others prefer sweet taste.

Shenzhen cheung fun shops are all over Shenzhen, from streets and alleys to commercial centers. With affordable prices and large portions, it is the first choice for Shenzhen people as a breakfast. Cheung fun shops usually provide various flavors of cheung fun and side dishes, allowing diners to choose according to their own taste.

The history of Shenzhen cheung fun can be traced back to the 1980s. After years of development, it has become an important part of Shenzhen's food culture. Each cheung fun shop has its unique production process and sauce formula, making the taste of Shenzhen cheung fun more rich and unique.
